title: Analytics
intro: Mock KPI projections show how CalmCove can measure awareness, engagement, and conversion after its first launch month.
recommendations: Increase Reels production because Instagram drives the strongest awareness and click-through performance.
Repurpose high-retention YouTube moments into Instagram and Facebook paid creatives.
Expand community prompts and UGC reposts because interaction lifts campaign relatability.
Retarget engaged video viewers with free-trial conversion ads during the final week of each campaign cycle.
